_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PELICAN PANEL
name: Academic Grade Monitor
author: academic-monitor@example.com
description: Generic academic portal grade monitor. Polls a student portal for new or changed grades at randomised intervals and fires Discord Webhook alerts. Ships a local web dashboard with session authentication, a live countdown timer, and grade statistics. Adapt PORTAL_* variables for any compatible portal.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# =================================================================
# GradeRemind — Pelican Installation Script
# Installer container : ghcr.io/pelican-eggs/installers:alpine
# Server directory    : /mnt/server
# =================================================================

set -e  # Abort on first error

cd /mnt/server

# -----------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. System dependencies
#    The installer image is Alpine-based; use apk.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------
echo "[1/4] Installing system dependencies..."
apk add --no-cache git curl python3 py3-pip > /dev/null 2>&1
echo "      Done."

# -----------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Clone or update the application repository
# -----------------------------------------------------------------
if [ -d ".git" ]; then
    echo "[2/4] Existing repository found. Updating to branch '${BRANCH}'..."
    git remote set-url origin "${GIT_REPO}"
    git fetch --all --prune
    git reset --hard "origin/${BRANCH}"
else
    echo "[2/4] Cloning ${GIT_REPO} (branch: ${BRANCH})..."
    git clone --depth=1 --branch "${BRANCH}" "${GIT_REPO}" .
fi
echo "      Done."

# -----------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Create a Python virtual environment inside /mnt/server
#    Storing the venv here means pip packages persist across
#    container restarts — the runtime yolk image itself is ephemeral.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------
echo "[3/4] Creating Python virtual environment (.venv)..."
python3 -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
echo "      Done."

# -----------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Install Python dependencies
# -----------------------------------------------------------------
echo "[4/4] Installing Python packages from requirements.txt..."
pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip --quiet
pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt --quiet
echo "      Done."

echo ""
echo "========================================================"
echo " GradeRemind installation complete!"
echo " Configure the environment variables in the panel,"
echo " then click Start to begin monitoring your grades."
echo "========================================================"

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: Full HTTPS URL of the GradeRemind repository to clone during installation. Change this if you have forked the project.

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: The git branch to clone and run. Use 'main' for stable releases.

variables.name: Portal Username
variables.description: Your portal login — either your institutional e-mail address or your CNP (national ID number).

variables.name: Portal Password
variables.description: Your portal account password. Stored as a panel secret — never logged or exposed in the UI.

variables.name: Portal Role
variables.description: Account role identifier. Use 0 for standard student accounts.

variables.name: Dashboard Port
variables.description: The port the web dashboard listens on inside the container. Must match your panel allocation.

variables.name: Discord Webhook URL
variables.description: Full Discord Webhook URL for grade-change notifications. Leave blank to disable Discord alerts.

variables.name: Check on Startup
variables.description: Set to 'true' to run a grade check immediately when the server starts instead of waiting for the first interval. Useful after a restart.

variables.name: Active Hours
variables.description: Restrict monitoring to a specific time window (24-hour format). Format: 'start-end', e.g. '6-23'. Leave blank for 24/7 monitoring.

variables.name: Min Check Interval (seconds)
variables.description: Minimum number of seconds to wait between automatic grade checks. Must be less than or equal to the maximum interval.

variables.name: Max Check Interval (seconds)
variables.description: Maximum number of seconds to wait between automatic grade checks. A random value between Min and Max is picked each time.

variables.name: Portal Base URL
variables.description: Base URL of the academic portal (no trailing slash). Example: https://your-university-portal.com

variables.name: Portal Login Path
variables.description: URL path for the portal login page.

variables.name: Portal API Path
variables.description: URL path for the portal authentication API endpoint.

variables.name: Portal Dashboard Path
variables.description: URL path for the academic dashboard page that contains grade data.

variables.name: Portal User Agent
variables.description: Real browser User-Agent to mimic normal browser traffic and prevent detection/firewall blocks. Example: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 ...
variables.default_value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
